snippet.title: When Moremi Falls (Official Trailer) - Daniel Etim Effiong, Bimbo Akintola
snippet.description:
Power. Control. Independence.

Moremi Bello has everything—except love.

But when she meets a man who refuses to be bought, her world begins to shift in ways she never expected.

From heartbreak to healing, from control to surrender…
this is a story about the risk of loving again.

Watch the official trailer for WHEN MOREMI FALLS.


#WhenMoremiFalls #OfficialTrailer #RomanticDrama #AfricanFilm

snippet.title: THEY GAVE US SHEVCHENKO FOR FREE 🎁 BUT SOMETHING’S WRONG 💀
snippet.description:
They gave us Andriy Shevchenko for FREE 🎁
but something feels OFF. 💀

00:00 Andriy Shevchenko Player Signing
01:01 Andriy Shevchenko Player Build
02:27 Andriy Shevchenko Team Selection
03:36 Andriy Shevchenko Gameplay Test
08:25 Andriy Shevchenko vs El Hadji Diouf Player Comparison
16:48 Andriy Shevchenko Player Review

In this video, I’m testing the FREE EPIC Shevchenko from the Daily Game Box in eFootball 2026 / eFootball Mobile - and this is not your typical review.

👉 Full gameplay analysis
👉 Real PvP matches
👉 Honest breakdown - no hype, no bias

At first glance, he looks like a clinical striker.
But once you actually use him… problems start to show.

💀 Heavy movement in tight dribbling
💀 Slow and clunky first touch
💀 Inconsistent aerial impact despite Bullet Header

Yes - he can finish.
Yes - he can score.
But is that enough in today’s META?

Or is this just another Free-to-Play trap?

I break down EVERYTHING:
✔ Finishing & shooting consistency
✔ Positioning & attacking runs
✔ Dribbling & responsiveness
✔ Heading & aerial duels
✔ Real in-game performance vs strong opponents

If you’re grinding the Daily Game Box / Daily Game Epic in eFootball…
👉 You NEED to watch this before investing your time.

🚨 HONEST REVIEW. REAL GAMEPLAY. NO EXCUSES. 🚨

localized.title: THEY GAVE US SHEVCHENKO FOR FREE 🎁 BUT SOMETHING’S WRONG 💀
localized.description:
They gave us Andriy Shevchenko for FREE 🎁
but something feels OFF. 💀

00:00 Andriy Shevchenko Player Signing
01:01 Andriy Shevchenko Player Build
02:27 Andriy Shevchenko Team Selection
03:36 Andriy Shevchenko Gameplay Test
08:25 Andriy Shevchenko vs El Hadji Diouf Player Comparison
16:48 Andriy Shevchenko Player Review

In this video, I’m testing the FREE EPIC Shevchenko from the Daily Game Box in eFootball 2026 / eFootball Mobile - and this is not your typical review.

👉 Full gameplay analysis
👉 Real PvP matches
👉 Honest breakdown - no hype, no bias

At first glance, he looks like a clinical striker.
But once you actually use him… problems start to show.

💀 Heavy movement in tight dribbling
💀 Slow and clunky first touch
💀 Inconsistent aerial impact despite Bullet Header

Yes - he can finish.
Yes - he can score.
But is that enough in today’s META?

Or is this just another Free-to-Play trap?

I break down EVERYTHING:
✔ Finishing & shooting consistency
✔ Positioning & attacking runs
✔ Dribbling & responsiveness
✔ Heading & aerial duels
✔ Real in-game performance vs strong opponents

If you’re grinding the Daily Game Box / Daily Game Epic in eFootball…
👉 You NEED to watch this before investing your time.

🚨 HONEST REVIEW. REAL GAMEPLAY. NO EXCUSES. 🚨

snippet.title: I Know You Will - Dunsin Oyekan #dunsinoyekan #revival #worship
snippet.description:
The story of a man solely helped by God. A God, a Father who is very much alive, attentive to the heart-cry of His sons.

The man, merely a vessel; his content is spirit, his expression is spirit.

When all from this realm was the silence of “what next?”, the God who worked behind the scenes sent His word into the quietness of my space. And those words, alive as they were, did not return to Him void.

In retrospect, all I can say is this: love births conviction, and His faithfulness stretches to the heavens.

God has never failed, and He will never fail.

Let everyone helped by God re-echo this personal, unshakeable conviction~ “I KNOW YOU WILL”.

Track 6 on the New Wine Album (2026) https://found.ee/NewWine

Listen to more songs here: On Dunsin Oyekan’s website: https://dunsinoyekan.com/music/

snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.title: I Built a Superhero Secret Base in Minecraft
snippet.description:
I Built a Secret Superhero Base in Minecraft
SUBSCRIBE to join the Cyborg Army 🦾😁💙
MY PRODUCTS 🡆 https://www.bionic.shop 👀

🎥 MY CHANNELS
@BionicLMAO
@DannyBionic 

👀 FOLLOW ME PLS
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dannybionic
Twitter: https://twitter.com/dannybionic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/danny.bionic/
Discord: https://discord.gg/bionic
My Editor: https://solo.to/cyberstudios

This video took place on a private modded Minecraft server, where we all were somewhat roleplaying! In this SMP, I, Bionic, had my Hero Suit. The boys had around 2 weeks to get as rich as possible with custom modded crafts, weapons, mechanics, etc... For the superhero secret base, I had it mapped out since the start of the server and even had most of it built on a private world. This made it easy to build, but still took me over 6 hours with some breaks... The boys and I agreed they'd attack once I was done to make the content and experience more fun, otherwise I would've been cooked hahaha. Hope you guys enjoyed!

#minecraft

snippet.description:
Buy or Rent Now: https://www.amazon.com/gp/video/detail/B0GW2S46B5/ref=atv_dp_share_cu_r

snippet.title: ROBLOX CREATOR SHOWDOWN 2
snippet.description:
Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Brothers Under Fire | Official Trailer (HD) | Vertical
snippet.description:
Captain Jordan Wright's (Kiefer Sutherland) squadron on leave for a wedding in Mexico encounters a murderous cartel. As Jordan tries to lead survivors to safety, war erupts between his squad and the cartel, forcing him into a battle to save his men.

Starring: Kiefer Sutherland, Omar Chaparro, Laura Osma
Directed by: Justin Chadwick
Release Date: April 17, 2026
